tutorials.title: Getting Started
tutorials.description: Three test cases: 1D dam break, 2D dam break, and scalar advection. Demonstrates multi-session workflow.

tutorials.title: 1D Dam Break (SWE)
tutorials.description: Classic Riemann problem for shallow water equations on a 1D domain.

tutorials.title: 2D Dam Break (SWE)
tutorials.description: Two-dimensional dam break simulation with shallow water equations.
